text:
Welcome to Stellar Evolution.”
“Look around you.”
“You’re surrounded by vast distances.”
 “And countless points of light.”
“To begin…Raise your hand in front of you and open your palm.”
(ghost hand appears demonstrating)
   “Now make a fist… and gently pull it toward you.”
“As you do, we’ll move closer.”
Once interaction is complete and animation starts, below VO will play -

“Across the universe, matter exists in simple forms.”
“Cold gas.”
“Fine dust.”
“And for long stretches of time, it drifts without change.”

“Stars are born inside nebulae.”
“These are enormous clouds of gas and dust — mostly hydrogen and helium.”
“At first, nothing dramatic happens.”
(pause)
“But gravity is already at work.”

Gravity pulls every particle toward every other particle.”
 “In a nebula, this pull is weak…”
 “But over millions of years, it adds up.”
